examples: "We know all about you," she said disdainfully.
"It is different in India," said Mistress Mary disdainfully.
"I would almost rather have no children at all," she said disdainfully [scornfully].
Satellite tracking, they say disdainfully, is not yet accurate enough for the tight margins within which they operate.
The Germanic bloc has treated Hollande as disdainfully as any other leader who questions the precise course of integration.
